summary: Attempt to navigate in directions beyond the buttons
description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is not logged in
AND the user is on the Welcome page

steps.action:
WHEN the user attempts to navigate left or right from any button 
AND the user attempts to navigate up from the "Create Free Account" button
AND the user attempts to navigate below the "Log In" button
steps.result: THEN after each attempt the following statement is spoken, "There is no selectable content available to the <direction> of the current position."
